comments: First play on UK radio for Metallica's 'Enter Sandman.'
Artists trailed by TV but not on the recording include Dan Reed Network, Beyond. L.A. Guns, Dare and Tigertailz and (presumably) the last session track, 'The Way You Were.'

sessions.details: one and only session (rpt). Recorded: 1991-02-22. No known commercial release.

track_listing.track: Tommy interviews Lars & James from Metallica about their soon to be released new album
Trailer for upcoming live concerts to be broadcast on Radio 1 – nice cameo from TV!

track_listing.details: CD-The Reality Of My Surroundings; Columbia

track_listing.track: BBC Radio 1 News @ 10.30 pm read by Brian Deacon
In The House Of My Father

track_listing.details: CD-For Unlawful Carnal Knowledge; Warner Bros.

track_listing.track: Tommy counts down the top 30 best selling UK rock/metal singles….
Tommy interviews Screaming Jets frontman David Gleeson over the telephone (he’s in Perth, Western Australia!)
BBC Radio One News @ 11.30 pm read by Brian Deacon
